violations.description: Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. -Auto fry not under vent hood is staining wall and ceiling.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Dusty ceiling vent in the back area. Walls and ceiling by auto fry have grease buildup.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Ceiling tile missing in back area above pop boxes exposing the attic.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
